## 🚀 Contribution Details

### Description
Please explain the goal of this PR and summarize the changes made.

---

### Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (text changes only)
- [ ] 🛠️ Refactoring (under the hood structural enhancements)

---

### Verification Checklist
- [ ] I have verified this locally by running the code or checking markdown links.
- [ ] Parallel translations (English and Chinese guide parity) are maintained.
- [ ] Commits follow clean engineering practices.
